goal: Harden M6 export so fixture or malformed adapter files cannot be packaged as valid lora_adapter/mlx_lora_adapter artifacts. Add export-time adapter file validation for safetensors, MLX npz, and adapter_config.json shape, plus focused tests and evidence. Do not create fake adapters, do not weaken runtime validation, do not change training wrappers, and do not claim M6-RC GO without real trained adapter endpoint evidence.
head: 7b1d6a8
blocked_scope: Creating or committing model weights or trained adapter artifacts
Pretending a fixture adapter is trained
Weakening model cache validation, verifier validation, auth, or endpoint behavior
Changing training wrappers, runtime loaders, or model catalog policy
M6-RC GO/sign-off changes before real adapter endpoint evidence or release-policy decision
allowed_edit_paths_scope_note: This gate may update export-time adapter artifact validation and focused export tests only. Large model/cache/adapter artifacts must remain outside git.
required_evidence: Focused read of export adapter copy/validation path
Tests proving malformed/fixture safetensors adapters are rejected
Tests proving valid safetensors-shaped CUDA lora_adapter can still export
If MLX validation is touched, tests or a documented reason for coverage scope
Explicit note that structural adapter validation does not prove trained adapter inference
warnings: This gate improves artifact integrity but cannot produce trained adapter endpoint evidence.
Do not commit adapter artifacts; tests must generate temporary minimal artifacts only.
Do not claim M6-RC GO from structural validation alone.

phase_notes.plan: Open scoped implementation contract for export adapter artifact validation.
phase_notes.audit: Focused read completed for export.py, export API/manifest tests, CUDA/MLX fake training outputs, and adapter artifact shape sections in the implementation guide.
phase_notes.build: Added export-time adapter_config/safetensors/npz structural validation and updated export fixtures/tests to use generated minimal structured adapters.
phase_notes.check: Focused export validation/API/Docker/runtime/parity tests, strict model catalog verification, contract JSON validation, git diff --check, and git diff --cached --check passed for closeout.
phase_notes.done: Evidence recorded in artifacts/review/export_adapter_validation_evidence.md. Structural adapter validation is verified, but M6-RC remains NOT_GO until real trained adapter endpoint evidence exists or release policy explicitly accepts fixture-adapter evidence.

pabcd.approved_scope: Export-time adapter artifact validation, focused tests, evidence, and operational handoff.
pabcd.blocked_scope: No fake trained-adapter claims, no model/adapter artifacts in git, no release GO changes.
pabcd.phase_completion_git_policy: When verification/evidence commands finish, stage, commit, and push this phase.
